title: How to Set Up and Use SpaceBot (Better Than OpenClaw?)
summary: SpaceBot is an open-source framework designed for building AI agents across Discord, Telegram, Slack, Twitch, and WebChat. The video demonstrates Docker installation, model routing for token efficiency, integration with scraping APIs like Apify, and multi-agent capabilities with features including memories, cron jobs, and workers.
